name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x v0.13: closes the catch loop. New cc-dex-sync.py reads the GB save, enriches it with per-creature lore (data/lore.json, 56 entries), computes dex completion + milestones (10/25/40/56), and writes cinder.creature.caught + cinder.dex.milestone rows back into cinder.db's growth-events feed. Catching now generates USB-side activity that raises tomorrow's encounter-pool tier — the consistent USB-feedback loop Joel asked for. Carries forward v0.12's GYM-LOGIC playable scene (15 bgs, ARCHIVIST EOS + 4 LOGIC trainers, type-chart riddle, EVENT_CC_BADGE_UNLOCK), v0.11's USB-driven encounter pool, 56 cinderized creature sprites, 16 script events, playable starter scenes, 5 sound FX, 5-type chart, 5 named gym leaders (ARCHIVIST EOS/WARDEN SOMA/CONDUCTOR TEMPO/COURIER HERMES/FOREMAN ATLAS).
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
